title: How to limit a group to only show the most recent form submission
excerpt:
We are utilizing a form to send submissions to a board divided into groups that each reflects a vehicle in our fleet. is there a way to get each group to only show the most recent submission? 
Thanks!

posts.author: mwillis (Michael Willis)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are utilizing a form to send submissions to a board divided into groups that each reflects a vehicle in our fleet. is there a way to get each group to only show the most recent submission?
